mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notice_read_record (notice_id, user_id) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice n WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_read_record r WHERE r.notice_id = n.notice_id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
SELECT r.notice_id FROM notice_read_record r JOIN notice n ON r.notice_id = n.notice_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0
